notes: Each keeper consumes this franchise's pick in the same 1-based round as last year's draft. You can list only rounds: [2, 11, 24], or include the player from your CBS export (column with 22*, 7*, etc.): [{ "player": "Trevor Story", "round": 22 }, ...]. Player is for your records/UI; snake order uses round only. Roster lookup (who is on which franchise) is regenerated as cbs_rosters_by_team.json when you run generate_data.py — use draft_round there as scratch, then copy into by_team.
